known_gaps: Complex pricing rules are difficult to set up and maintain — operators often need ongoing support for anything beyond basic structures
Channel manager is limited — connecting to multiple OTAs requires workarounds and is less reliable than dedicated channel managers
Customer-facing booking experience can feel dated compared to newer platforms — affects conversion
Mobile experience for operators managing bookings on the go is weaker than current standards
Limited upsell capability at the point of checkout
discovery_questions: How are you finding Checkfront for managing your OTA connections — is that working smoothly?
What does the checkout experience look like for your guests — are you happy with how it converts?
Are there things you find yourself working around in Checkfront that slow you down day-to-day?
fareharbor_comparison: Modern, mobile-optimised booking flow with higher typical conversion rates
Stronger and more reliable OTA and channel manager integrations
Built-in upsell and add-on capability at checkout
